landing.title: Discover the Korean name made for you
landing.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions and our naming engine composes an authentic Korean name — with real meaning, beautiful hanja, and a card you'll want to share.
landing.feature1d: Real syllables Koreans actually use in names.
landing.feature2d: Matched to your traits, values and energy.
landing.feature3d: Download a beautiful card for IG & TikTok.

ritual.1: Choosing characters that carry your meaning…

intro.title: Tell us about you
intro.sub: Your name and where you're from — and your handle if you'd like it on the card.
intro.handleOptIn: Show "@handle's Korean name" on my card

name.title: What's your name?
name.sub: We'll gently echo its sound in your Korean name.

feel.title: How should your name feel?
feel.sub: Pick the energy that fits you.

soundLike.title: Should your name sound like your real name?
soundLike.sub: We can echo your real name's sound — or not.

birth.title: When were you born?
birth.sub: Your birth chart shapes which element your name supplies.

value.title: What matters most to you?
value.sub: Choose the value at your core.

aspiration.title: Who do you want to become?
aspiration.sub: Tap one — or type your own.

vibe.title: What's your vibe?
vibe.sub: The aesthetic that feels like you.

favKorean.title: Favourite Korean words, names or sounds?

unique.title: One thing that makes you unique

handle.title: Your Instagram / Threads handle
handle.sub: Optional — and only shown if you allow it.
handle.optIn: Show "@handle's Korean name" on my card

reading.title: Your name reading
reading.subtitle: Read the way a Korean 작명소 (naming house) would

result.share: Share to unlock a hidden meaning
result.shareUnlockHint: Share to unlock a hidden meaning
result.shareText: My Korean name is {{hangul}} ({{roman}}). Get yours free in 60 seconds — what will yours be?
result.shareTextArchetype: My Korean name is {{hangul}} ({{roman}}) — {{archetype}}. Get yours free in 60 seconds. What will yours be?
result.emailSub: We'll send a printable certificate and new name drops.

handcraft.story: K-Name began with our founder hand-writing names, one by one, with a brush. We still offer the real thing.
handcraft.title: Get your name hand-brushed by a real person
handcraft.sub: A real calligrapher brushes your name on paper — filmed just for you.
handcraft.scarcity: Only 10 hand-made each week. Share your card to enter the draw.
handcraft.thanks: Request received. We'll be in touch by email.
handcraft.entered: You're entered in this week's draw.
handcraft.special: Want a specific surname or hanja (e.g. 허, or a 道 character)? The hand-brushed tier handles special requests the auto-generator can't.
handcraft.shareToEnter: Share your card to enter the draw

error.generic: Something went wrong composing your name. Please try again.
